message:
test(conformance): allow GNU spec sections in stdio_file_ops cases

stdio_file_ops_has_spec_references previously rejected any
spec_section that was not C11 or POSIX, but the recent fixture
regeneration introduced GNU-extension references (e.g. fopen/fmemopen
GNU-only modes). Extend the predicate to accept GNU as a third
recognized standard so the fixture remains the source of truth and
the test does not block a legitimate generator output.

The regenerated fixture data covering these GNU references shipped
in commit 34d13ccc (stdbit uc/us regen pass); this commit only
adjusts the assertion. All 17 stdio_file_ops_conformance_test
cases pass via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
